title: Anthropic Just Dropped a Masterclass on Building Agent Harnesses (for Large Codebases)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates how to build an "AI Layer" harness around Claude for large codebase work, showing that the context, configuration, and tooling architecture matters more than the base model. The approach includes self-improving hooks, scoped skills, LSP, MCPs, and subagents as modular components.
